OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Creates account, party relationship group, and account contact relationship records to capture details of the benefit applicant's household.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: CreateHousehold

omniProcessElements.name: PSSCreateHousehold
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "Account" : "%PSSFetchDetailsForBusinessAccount%", "Contact" : "%PSSFetchParticipantContact%", "HeadOfHouseholdContactId" : "%PSSGetContactIdFromPersonAccount:ContactId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSCreateHousehold1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: PSSFetchDetailsForBusinessAccount
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "PublicApplicationParticipantId" : "%LoopPublicApplicationParticipant:SetBusinessAccount:ParticipantIdForBusinessAccount%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSFetchDetailsForBusinessAccount1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction4", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: PSSFetchParticipantContact
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSFetchParticipantContact1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction2", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "PublicApplicationParticipant", "sendJSONPath" : "PSSFetchPublicApplicationParticipants:ApplicationParticipant", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: PSSFetchPublicApplicationParticipants
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "IndividualApplicationId" : "%ContextId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "" : "" }, "bundle" : "PSSFetchPublicApplicationParticipants1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: PSSGetContactIdFromPersonAccount
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "AccountId" : "%PSSFetchDetailsForBusinessAccount:Id%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSGetContactIDFromPersonAccount1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction4", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: ResponseAction1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "additionalOutput" : { }, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "ResponseAction1", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "HouseholdResult", "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { "AccountID" : "%PSSCreateHousehold:Account_1:Id%", "HouseholdName" : "CONCAT(Account:FirstName, ' ', Account:LastName, ' ', \"Household\")" } }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "description" : "", "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "labelPlural" : "", "labelSingular" : "", "linkToExternalObject" : "", "mockResponseMap" : { }, "nameColumn" : "", "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "rollbackOnError" : true, "trackingCustomData" : { }, "ttlMinutes" : 5 }
